options.a: Visibility is 5000 m or more, no significant cloud below 10 000 m, no significant weather.
options.b: Visibility is 10 000 m or more, no significant cloud below 5000 ft or 1500 m, no significant weather.
options.c: Visibility is 5000 ft or more, no significant cloud below 1500 m, no significant weather.
options.d: Visibility is 10 000 m or more, no significant cloud below 5000 m, no significant weather.
